news.paragraph: Boeing is experiencing volatility following a China plane order that disappointed market expectations, contributing to a recent 7% drop in share price. While operational delays continue to be a factor, Citigroup has raised its price target for the stock to $260 and maintains a buy rating. Options traders should consider the tension between these underwhelming order volumes and optimistic analyst valuations amid shifting US-China trade dynamics.
